highlights.text: My general lean for Monday is we resume down to 5400, perhaps 5372-78.
I wrote yesterday: “Generally the bull case for tomorrow would see ES building out structure.
As I’ve discussed at length though, there is something close to a law that exists in ES in which every significant “elevator down” move has a correspondent short squeeze .
Those are both possible pivots to bounce us, with 5474-78 being an obvious backtest magnet”.

post_title: CPI Day Tomorrow. Expect Volatility in SPX. September 11th Plan
